content.json:
## Foundry — Agent Performance & Tool Latency

Breaks down per-tool latency so you can pinpoint **which tool span is dominating end-to-end latency** (data tools, search, model, etc.).

All panels query AppDependencies (App Insights) using OpenTelemetry GenAI semantic conventions.

parameters.name: Project
parameters.query:
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where Name startswith 'tool.' or Name startswith 'gen_ai'
| extend Project = coalesce(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.project']), 'unknown')
| distinct Project
| union (datatable(Project:string)['*'])
| order by Project asc

content.query:
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Name startswith 'tool.' or Name startswith 'gen_ai'
| extend Project = coalesce(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.project']), 'unknown')
| where '{Project}' == '*' or Project == '{Project}'
| summarize p50=percentile(DurationMs,50), p95=percentile(DurationMs,95), p99=percentile(DurationMs,99), count() by Name
| order by p95 desc
content.title: Span latency (p50/p95/p99) — last selected window

content.query:
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Name startswith 'tool.fabric'
| summarize p95=percentile(DurationMs,95) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| render timechart
content.title: Tool span p95 over time — top data-tool span (example: tool.fabric)

content.query:
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Name startswith 'gen_ai.completion'
| extend Project = coalesce(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.project']), 'unknown')
| extend Model   = coalesce(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), 'unknown')
| summarize calls=count(), p95=percentile(DurationMs,95) by Project, Model
| order by calls desc
content.title: Model call volume + p95 by project & model

content.query:
AppExceptions
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Properties['gen_ai.system'] == 'azure-openai' or Properties['span.kind'] in ('agent','tool')
| summarize count() by Type, OuterMessage
| top 20 by count_
content.title: Top agent / tool exceptions
